tr.td: Self-heating in large quantities; may catch fire

Substances and mixtures which in contact with water, emit flammable gases

tr.td: Harms public health and the environment by destroying ozone in the upper atmosphere

td.dl: UN Model Regulations Class or Division

tr.td: Harms public health and the environment by contributing to global warming
Hazardous by contributing to global warming

tr.td: Fatal if swallowed or in contact with skin
Acute toxicity, oral; acute toxicity, dermal

Acute toxicity, dermal; acute toxicity, inhalation

Cause skin irritation and serious eys irritation
Skin corrosion/irritation and serious eye damage/eye irritation
